subcodes.title: Words spoken en route in carriage in Haifa, 1915-04-25
subcodes.first_line: These warring, Christian nations call themselves the followers of the Nazarene but do not live in accord with his teachings... Do we Bahá'ís live according to the principles of His Holiness Bahá'u'lláh? We must be just.
subcodes.subjects: @words vs deeds, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @criticism and its limits, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @happiness; joyfulness; joy and sorrow
